Class CommandUtil

java.lang.Object
io.apicurio.datamodels.util.CommandUtil
public class CommandUtil extends Object
Utility class for marshalling (Command → JSON) and unmarshalling (JSON → Command) of ICommand instances. Commands are serialized with a __type field identifying the command class name, and all public fields are included in the JSON output.
Author:
eric.wittmann@gmail.com

  • Constructor Details

    • CommandUtil

      public CommandUtil()

  • Method Details

    • create

      public static ICommand create(String cmdType)
      Creates a new command instance by class name using reflection.
      Parameters:
      cmdType - the simple class name of the command (e.g. "ChangeTitleCommand")
      Returns:
      a new, empty command instance

    • unmarshall

      public static ICommand unmarshall(com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode from)
      Unmarshalls a JSON object into an ICommand instance. The JSON must contain a __type field identifying the command class name.
      Parameters:
      from - the JSON object to deserialize
      Returns:
      the deserialized command

    • marshall

      public static com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode marshall(ICommand command)
      Marshalls an ICommand instance into a JSON object. The resulting JSON includes a __type field identifying the command class name, followed by all public fields. Special field types are handled automatically:
      • NodePath fields are serialized as strings
      • Nested ICommand fields (e.g. in AggregateCommand) are recursively marshalled
      Parameters:
      command - the command to serialize
      Returns:
      the JSON representation of the command
